etymology.interpretation: The character 回(回) (huí, "return; turn back") is a pictogram depicting a spiral or circular motion, symbolizing the concept of rotation or turning back. This visually represents the idea of returning or turning back, as one would follow a circular path to come back to a starting point.

examples.chinese: 我明天会回家(我明天會回家)。
她走到门口又回来了(她走到門口又回來了)。
examples.pinyin: Tā zǒu dào ménkǒu yòu huílái le.
examples.english: She went to the door and then returned.

examples.chinese: 会议结束后(會議結束後)，我们一起回去(我們一起回去)。
examples.pinyin: Huìyì jiéshù hòu, wǒmen yīqǐ huíqù.
examples.english: After the meeting ends, we will return together.
